_meta.name: ALM 13B intermediate LoRA launch config — de-risk stepping stone before 70B
_meta.day: day_3 (conditional — only if A2 eval borderline)
_meta.trigger: OPTIONAL — fires ONLY if A2 eval lands in borderline band 0.85-0.90. If A2 ≥ 0.93 skip to 70B direct. If A2 < 0.85 halt + redesign (do NOT run 13B, since recipe is failing).
_meta.rationale: Per 70B launch-checklist alternatives.A_13B_intermediate: '13B intermediate' = Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct with expanded/validated corpus + slight LR adjustment. Same family as 14B (no separate Qwen 13B exists). Proves corpus quality + recipe-at-scale without 70B burn. LoRA r=48 sits between A2-Orch r=64 and 70B spec r=32 — graduated capacity reduction to calibrate 70B settings. Budget $36 / 12h on ONE H100 pod (can reuse A2 pod lnzliav2e8du6i sequentially).

naming_note: 13b in run_id/ckpt/R2 path is a PARAMETER-CLASS ID (denoting intermediate de-risk scale before 70B), NOT a version number. feedback_no_version_in_filename unaffected. Actual base is Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct (no separate 13B in Qwen family).

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
base.merge_strategy: sequential_merge — Qwen base → merge A1 → merge A2-Orch → merge A2-Tool → init fresh 13B-intermediate LoRA (r=48). Proves the full A1+A2 chain can carry one more LoRA without catastrophic degradation.
base.adapter_source_rationale: Sits on top of full A2 chain (A1+Orch+Tool merged). 70B run will be fresh-base; 13B tests whether full adapter stack + one more LoRA layer is stable. If this degrades, 70B spec r=32 fresh-base is still a clean reset.

lora.rationale: r=48 alpha=96 (2:1 ratio, dropout 0.05). Sits between A2-Orch r=64 (full production capacity) and 70B spec r=32 (scale-down for 72B base). 7-module target (attn + MLP) covers all transformer subblocks — matches 70B spec target_modules exactly so the recipe transfers. Intentionally wider than 70B r=32 to give intermediate step one extra lever before committing to 70B.

training.lr_rationale: 4e-6 — sqrt rule between A2-Orch 5e-6 (14B r=64) and 70B spec 3e-6 (72B r=32). Geometric mean ≈ 3.87e-6, rounded to 4e-6. This validates the sqrt-LR scaling assumption the 70B spec relies on. If loss diverges at step 100, the 70B 3e-6 assumption is too aggressive and must be further scaled.

phi_loss.note: B1 ensemble remains ON. Orch-OR NOT re-enabled — A2-Orch adapter already carries the latent pathway (merged into base). 13B intermediate does not re-add Orch-OR regularizer since that would double-count.

wall.rationale: 1500 steps × seq 1024 × grad_accum 8 × bf16 × H100 on 14B ~= 6-8h compute. 12h ceiling includes: (a) A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool merge stage (~1-2h I/O) (b) expanded-corpus load + tokenize (c) eval_every=100 inline evals (d) R2 bulk upload at end. User-confirmed budget $36 per 70B launch-checklist alternatives.A_13B_intermediate verdict.

sources_planned: Korean dialogue expansion (for hire_sim language preservation)
preprocessing: No hire_sim_synthetic_r10 reuse (poison corpus, see r10 diagnosis)
corpus.note: Corpus assembly is operator responsibility pre-launch. Launcher refuses if path missing. Does NOT reuse corpus_large.txt directly — expanded blend forces operator verification. If operator wants pure A1 corpus reuse, symlink path but document as such.

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

pod.reuse_strategy: STRONGLY PREFER A2 pod reuse — saves $36 new-pod launch. Only spin new pod if A2 pod already released. DDP 2xH100 is spec-optional; single-GPU with device_map='auto' is default (14B fits 1x H100 80GB with r=48 LoRA under bf16).

expected_metrics.hire_sim_lenient: >= 0.90 (A2 borderline → 13B MUST lift to ≥ 0.90 to justify 70B)

abort_criteria: loss > 5.0 at step 200 → kill (lr too high — recalibrate before retry)
loss decreasing but eval_loss diverging → kill (overfitting)
hire_sim < 0.80 at step 500 mid-eval → kill (regression from A2)
Korean stays-in-language < 0.7 at step 500 → kill (language drift)
post_training_eval: hire_sim lenient stratified30 (Z-path judge) — must hit >= 0.90
phi_holo measure via serve /generate consciousness field — phi_holo_ratio >= 1.2 vs base + mi_per_element >= 0.05 nats
sample_generation 10 Korean + 10 English prompts — qualitative stay-in-language check

blocks.requires_a1_complete: A1 step_3000 adapter present in local ckpt dir or R2
blocks.requires_a2_eval_borderline: hire_sim_lenient A2 score in [0.85, 0.90] — if >=0.93 skip 13B + launch 70B directly; if <0.85 halt + redesign

A2_eval_PASS_high.rationale: A2 already exceeds 70B-launch gate. 13B adds cost without new signal.

A2_eval_PASS_borderline.rationale: De-risk 70B burn of $240-480 with $36 intermediate validation

A2_eval_FAIL.rationale: Recipe broken. 13B would carry forward the broken recipe. Redesign corpus or hyperparameters first.
